reread: AdminBasicInfoController.java shows @CrossOrigin(origins="*") repeated on every CRUD endpoint method; candidate records this as one aggregated per-controller authority fact instead of per-endpoint entries.
reread: SecurityConfig.java CorsConfigurationSource bean allows all origins/methods/headers with credentials disabled and maxAge 3600 on /**, matching both candidate objects.

Reference records that SecurityConfig inserts a JWT filter before UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter on the security filter chain; no remaining candidate atom in this pair states a JWT-filter check on the authority axis.

reread: SecurityConfig.java permits swagger-ui.html, webjars, images, configuration, swagger-resources, v2 paths without authentication.
reread: SecurityConfig.java requires ADMIN role on /api/v1/adminbasicservice/** as the catch-all after the GET carve-outs.
